title: Mirror Horror Project
description: Welcome to the Mirror Horror Project mod. This mod adds a creature from creepypasta - Mirror, a lost soul from the player's past, and a creepy dark creature that appears in a thunder when the player sleeps in the open.
body: Welcome to the Mirror Horror Project mod. This mod adds a creature from creepypasta - Mirror. When a player entered her world, she recognized it as a past player, whom she also killed. His soul is still wandering the world in an unsuccessful attempt to return home. You can talk to entities, but never try to attack the Soul. As you progress, you will receive items from which you can craft new weapons and armor that will help you defend against entities more easily. When you reach the End and defeat the dragon, you will be able to see a tall stone tower from which the Mirror will look at you. If you try to talk to her, she will lock you in her pocket dimension FOREVER...
